description: The Light Gizmo is used to control lights, and is generated by the Dev Tool.

fields._pointIconActive: The field to drive to control the enabled of the point light icon.
fields._spotIconActive: The field to drive to control the enabled of the spot light icon.
fields._directionalIconActive: The field to drive to control the enabled of the directional light icon.
fields._pointActive: The field to drive to control the enabled of the point light controls.
fields._spotActive: The field to drive to control the enabled of the spot light controls.
fields._directionalActive: The field to drive to control the enabled of the directional light controls.
fields._pointGizmo: Stores the point light gizmo component.
fields._spotGizmo: Stores the spot light gizmo component.
fields._dirGizmo: Stores the directional light gizmo component.
fields._iconMaterial: The field to drive to control the icon material.
